summary: Focana 2.2.1 tightens the task planning screens from 2.2.0, with cleaner compact previews and more reliable start and edit paths.
improvements: What's next? now keeps Start new task, the input, and Next together, with full-width Session History and Parking Lot lists below.
Session History details now include the session builder, so subtasks and Next-up tasks can be adjusted before restarting.
Active timer and session builder lists now show three rows by default, with scrolling, View all, and Show less when there is more.
Compact mode now separates task and timer actions: click the task to expand Subtasks and Next up, or click the time for controls.
Compact previews now support checking off subtasks and use clearer Subtasks and Next up sections.
Quick start is now visible in the task builder when a task is ready to begin.
Notes are now one field for immediate next steps, links, resources, or return notes.
fixes: The floating X now follows the delayed pulse path instead of immediately reopening the old What's next? screen.
Ready-to-resume and history restore now keep task plans, subtasks, and Next-up tasks attached.
Compact previews now keep the three-row cap visible, scroll correctly, and avoid clipped list items.
The compact task summary is now centered inside the outlined task area.
